result:
Build green. Summary:

**Root cause** — Two bugs combined to make `checkcompt("field 'huge'", "return math.huge << 1")` fail at math.lua's `checkerror`:

1. `crates/lua-vm/src/tagmethods.rs:557` — `try_bin_tm` returned `LuaError::int_overflow(p1, p2)` which produced a bare `"number has no integer representation"` with no varinfo enrichment. The C `luaG_tointerror` calls `varinfo(L, p)` to add `" (field 'huge')"`, `" (local 'x')"`, etc.
2. `crates/lua-vm/src/debug.rs:1311` — `var_info` already wired up `get_obj_name`, but threw the captured name away with `name = b"?";`, so even when `kind` was correctly identified the displayed name was always `?`.

**Fix** — Threaded `Option<StackIdx>` for both operands through `try_bin_tm` / `try_bin_assoc_tm` / `try_bini_tm` (and their `state.rs` wrappers and `vm.rs` OP_MMBIN{,I,K}/OP_UNM/OP_BNOT call sites), and routed the bitwise-on-non-int error through `debug::to_int_error` which builds the message via `var_info`. Also fixed `var_info` to copy `nref` into an owned `Vec<u8>` before `proto` is dropped, so the resolved name survives.

**New state** — `math.huge << 1` now reports `number (field 'huge') has no integer representation`, which matches the `"field 'huge'"` pattern `checkcompt` expects. The full mega-loop will re-test math.lua to confirm progress past this assertion; later checkerror cases in the file may surface additional fixes but the immediate blocker (combined line 56 / math.lua line 47 assertion) is resolved.

tool_input.command:
cat > /tmp/math_dbg.lua <<'EOF'
local minint <const> = math.mininteger
local maxint <const> = math.maxinteger
local intbits <const> = math.floor(math.log(maxint, 2) + 0.5) + 1
local floatbits = 24
do
  local p = 2.0^floatbits
  while p < p + 1.0 do
    p = p * 2.0
    floatbits = floatbits + 1
  end
end

local function checkerror (msg, f, ...)
  local s, err = pcall(f, ...)
  print("    pcall s=", s, "err=", err, "expecting=", msg)
  assert(not s and string.find(err, msg))
end

local msgf2i = "number.* has no integer representation"

print(">>>checkcompt 1: divide by zero")
local f = load("return 2 // 0")
print("  load returned:", f, type(f))
if f then
  local s,e = pcall(f)
  print("  pcall:", s, e)
end

print(">>>checkcompt 2: 2.3 >> 0")
local f = load("return 2.3 >> 0")
print("  load returned:", f, type(f))
if f then
  local s,e = pcall(f)
  print("  pcall:", s, e)
end
EOF
target/debug/lua-rs "$(cat /tmp/math_dbg.lua)" 2>&1 | tail -30

tool_input.description: Run debug Lua script through lua-rs
